smoke.detail: Box (rosenbluth) pixi.lock solved (linux-64 only, real conda-forge hashes, librdkit 2026.03.3). pixi run pytest tests/test_model_toxicophores.py -m model -q => 3 passed. FTO-43 fixture returns the three fields {tox_alert_hit, tox_alert_count, catalog=BRENK} consistent (hit iff count>0; raw.tox_alert_matches and raw.tox_alert_names lengths == count); nitrobenzene BRENK-hit (nitro_group), ethane clean; output validates against core.schemas.OutputRecord.

note: Single documented toxicity alert catalog = BRENK (RDKit FilterCatalog); toxicity intent, distinct from t17 pains_brenk (assay-interference) by intent/endpoint not mechanism; soft over-flagging filter; box-solved lock + smoke ok.
